ab: miakuza ihu tu makunanai?
en: A: How did you get here?

ab: mundadaan iaku makunanai.
en: I came on foot.

ab: numa wa barimbin ilhungquan uhu munai?
en: A: What kind of car did you take?

ab: milhungqu iaku sa ba-su makunanai.
en: B: I came by bus.

ab: miakuza ihu mutusi mriqariqaz shiz a taun?
en: A: How did you get to the hospital?

ab: naak a ama pumbarimbin iakin malhintal mutantu.
en: B: Dad drove me with him.

ab: amiakuza thithu miaqay ya amutusi lhupilhupishan a taun?
en: A: How does he usually go to school?

ab: milhungqu thithu mabiskaw a barimbin ya mutusi lhupilhupishan a taun.
en: B: He took the subway to school.

ab: miakuza mihu a apuki’ay ya mutusi fariw sa shanglaw?
en: A: How does your grandmother go to the grocery store?

ab: matung’utu-bai thithu ya mutusi fariw sa shanglaw.
en: B: She went to the grocery store on a motorcycle.

ab: amiakuza ihu ya mutusi Lalu?
en: A: How are you going to get to LaRue?

ab: amunruza iaku ya mutusi Lalu.
en: B: I'm taking a boat to LaRue.

ab: amiakuza thithu ya mutusi Lit-puun?
en: A: Why is he going to Japan?

ab: milhungqu thithu sa marfazfaz a barimbin mutusi Lit-puun.
en: B: He took a plane to Japan.

ab: numa wa barimbin ya ilhungquan thithu ya mutusi Kau-shiung?
en: A: What bus did he take to Kaohsiung?

ab: milhungqu thithu sa mabiskaw maquliush a barimbin mutusi Kau-shiung.
en: B: He took the THSR to Kaohsiung.

ab: kazaiku thithu milhungqu sa apuy a barimbin mutusi Tai-taang?
en: A: Did he take a train to Taitung?

ab: ua, milhungqu thithu apuy a barimbin mutusi Tai-taang
en: B: Yes, he took a train to Taitung.

ab: kazaiku thithu milhungqu sa apuy a barimbin mutusi Tai-taang?
en: A: Did he take a train to Taitung?

ab: ani, milhungqu thithu marfazfaz a barimbin mutusi Tai-taang.
en: B: No, he took a plane to Taitung.

ab: itia qa ia’ianan milhungqu sa ba-su iqualh?
en: A: Is there a bus stop near here?

ab: itia, ialunlunduz uhu munsai saran shduuiza mriqaz sa ia’ianan milhungqu sa ba-su itanamuqtha.
ch: B:有，你從這條路直直地走去就可以看到公車站在前面了。
en: B: Yes, you can see the bus standing in front of you if you go straight down this road.

ab: intua s ya iqualh inai a ia’ianan milhungqu sa mabiskaw a barimbin?
ch: A:離這裡最近的捷運站在哪裡?
en: A: Where is the nearest MRT station?

ab: uka inai sa ia’ianan milhungqu sa mabiskaw a barimbin, muqay ihu shduu milhungqu sa shadunan a barimbin.
ch: B:這裡沒有捷運站，你只能坐計程車。
en: B: There is no MRT station here, you can only take a taxi.

ab: alhakaiza shaunatantu lhupilhupishan a taun ya milhungqu sa ba-su?
ch: A:如果搭公車多久會到學校?
en: A: How long will it take to get to the school if I take the bus?

ab: makthin rima wa qumbu ashaunatantu lhupilhupishan a taun.
en: B:15 minutes to school.

ab: alhakaiza shaunatantu Tai-tiuung ya milhungqu sa mabiskaw maquliush a barimbin?
ch: A:如果搭高鐵要多久時間會到臺中?
en: A: How long will it take to get to Taichung if I take the THSR?

ab: tata wa tilhaz ashaunatantu Tai-tiuung.
en: B: I will come to Taichung in an hour.

ab: amindaaq qa ya pumbarimbin amutusi U-lai?
en: A: Is it a long drive to Ulai?

ab: amintata wa tilhaz painan.
en: B: It takes about an hour.

ab: alhakaiza shaunatantu naak a taun ya milhungqu sa mabiskaw a barimbin?
ch: A:你搭捷運來我家要多久?
en: A: How long did it take you to come to my house by subway?

ab: aminpushaz a qumbu painan.
en: B: It takes 20 minutes.

ab: mafazaq ihu qa kmangqtha sa kangqthaan a barimbin?
en: A: Do you know how to ride a bicycle?

ab: mafazaq iaku kmangqtha sa kangqthaan a barimbin.
en: B: I can ride a bicycle.

ab: itia s mihu a utu-bai?
en: A: Do you have a motorcycle?

ab: itia naak a utu-bai latata.
en: B: I have a motorcycle.

ab: itia s mihu a utu-bai?
en: A: Do you have a motorcycle?

ab: ani, uka naak a utu-bai.
en: B: No, I don't have a motorcycle.
